name: lucidagentide-desktop
description: Electron desktop shell for LucidAgentIDE + omp — gated agent chat + live security/memory dashboards.

scripts.build: bun build main.ts --target=node --format=cjs --external electron --outfile dist/main.js && bun build preload.ts --target=node --format=cjs --external electron --outfile dist/preload.js
